values.name: indexRelativeToAbsolute
values.comment:
zipper : Zipper Int
    zipper = ( [ 0, 0, 0 ], 0, [ 0, 0, 0 ] )

    indexRelativeToAbsolute zipper -4 --> -1

    indexRelativeToAbsolute zipper -3 --> 0

    indexRelativeToAbsolute zipper -1 --> 2

    indexRelativeToAbsolute zipper 0 --> 3

    indexRelativeToAbsolute zipper 1 --> 4

    indexRelativeToAbsolute zipper 3 --> 6

    indexRelativeToAbsolute zipper 4 --> 7
values.type: Zipper.ListElemList.Zipper a -> Basics.Int -> Basics.Int

values.name: indexedFilter
values.comment:
fromTuple ( [ 1, 2, 3 ], 4, [ 5, 6, 7 ] )
        |> indexedFilter (\{ section, rightEdge } val -> section == Selected || rightEdge == 0 || val == 6)
        --> fromTuple ( [ 3 ], 4, [ 6, 7 ] )

    fromTuple ( [ 1, 2, 3 ], 4, [ 5, 6, 7 ] )
        |> indexedFilter (\{ leftEdge, rightEdge } val -> leftEdge == 0 || rightEdge == 0)
        --> fromTuple ( [ 1, 3 ], 4, [ 5, 7 ] )
values.type: (Zipper.ListElemList.Position -> a -> Basics.Bool) -> Zipper.ListElemList.Zipper a -> Zipper.ListElemList.Zipper a

values.name: indexedMap
values.comment:
fromTuple ( [ 1, 2, 3 ], 4, [ 5, 6, 7 ] )
        |> indexedMap (\{ leftEdge } val -> (leftEdge + 1) * 10 + val)
        --> fromTuple ( [ 11, 22, 33 ], 14, [ 15, 26, 37 ] )
values.type: (Zipper.ListElemList.Position -> a -> b) -> Zipper.ListElemList.Zipper a -> Zipper.ListElemList.Zipper b

values.comment:
Attempt to move selection to left

    ( [ 2, 1 ], 3, [ 4, 5 ] )
        |> moveLeft
        --> Just ( [ 1 ], 2, [ 3, 4, 5 ] )

    ( [], 3, [ 4, 5 ] )
        |> moveLeft
        --> Nothing

values.name: moveLeftUntil
values.comment:
Move left until function returns True. If no match found, returns `Nothing`.

    ( [ 3, 2, 1 ], 4, [ 5, 6, 7 ] )
        |> moveLeftUntil identity identity (\_ n _ -> n == 2)
        --> Just ( [ 1 ], 2, [ 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 ] )

    ( [ 3, 2, 1 ], 4, [ 5, 6, 7 ] )
        |> moveLeftUntil identity identity (\_ n _ -> n == 1)
        --> Just ( [], 1, [ 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 ] )

    ( [ 3, 2, 1 ], 4, [ 5, 6, 7 ] )
        |> moveLeftUntil identity identity (\_ n _ -> n == 100)
        --> Nothing
values.type: (a -> b) -> (b -> c) -> (List.List a -> b -> List.List c -> Basics.Bool) -> Zipper.ListElemList.Advanced.Zipper a b c -> Maybe.Maybe (Zipper.ListElemList.Advanced.Zipper a b c)

values.name: toNonemptyListDropLeft
values.comment:
Convert zipper to a nonempty list by dropping all left elements. Fully compatible with [coreygirard/elm-nonempty-list](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/coreygirard/elm-nonempty-list/latest/)

    ( [ 2, 1 ], 3, [ 4, 5 ] )
        |> toNonemptyListDropLeft
        --> ( 3, [ 4, 5 ] )
values.type: Zipper.ListElemList.Advanced.Zipper a b c -> ( b, List.List c )

values.name: toNonemptyListDropRight
values.comment:
Convert zipper to a nonempty list by dropping all left elements. Fully compatible with [coreygirard/elm-nonempty-list](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/coreygirard/elm-nonempty-list/latest/). Note that the relative order of elements changes to fit the nonempty list type.

    ( [ 2, 1 ], 3, [ 4, 5 ] )
        |> toNonemptyListDropRight
        --> ( 3, [ 1, 2 ] )

values.name: indexedMap

        |> indexedMap (\{first} _ -> first)
        --> fromTuple ( [ 0, 1 ], [ 2, 3, 4, 5 ] )

    fromTuple ( [ 0, 0 ], [ 0, 0, 0, 0 ] )
        |> indexedMap (\{last} _ -> last)
        --> fromTuple ( [ 5, 4 ], [ 3, 2, 1, 0 ] )

    fromTuple ( [ 0, 0 ], [ 0, 0, 0, 0 ] )
        |> indexedMap (\{leftEdge} _ -> leftEdge)
        --> fromTuple ( [ 0, 1 ], [ 0, 1, 2, 3 ] )

    fromTuple ( [ 0, 0 ], [ 0, 0, 0, 0 ] )
        |> indexedMap (\{rightEdge} _ -> rightEdge)
        --> fromTuple ( [ 1, 0 ], [ 3, 2, 1, 0 ] )

values.name: moveToN
values.comment:
Attempt to move the split by specifying the length of the resulting left list. If the split would be invalid, eg `n < 0` or `n > length zipper`, returns `Nothing`.

    ( [ 2, 1 ], [ 3, 4 ] )
        |> moveToN identity identity -1
        == Nothing

    ( [ 2, 1 ], [ 3, 4 ] )
        |> moveToN identity identity 1
        == Just ( [ 1 ], [ 2, 3, 4 ] )

    ( [ 2, 1 ], [ 3, 4 ] )
        |> moveToN identity identity 4
        == Just ( [ 4, 3, 2, 1 ], [] )
values.type: (a -> b) -> (b -> a) -> Basics.Int -> Zipper.ListList.Advanced.Zipper a b -> Maybe.Maybe (Zipper.ListList.Advanced.Zipper a b)

zipper : Zipper Int
    zipper = fromTuple ( [ 1, 2, 3 ], [ 4, 5 ] )

    zipper |> getAt 2 --> Just 3

    zipper |> getAt 5 --> Nothing

values.name: arrowLeft
values.comment:
Matches what happens when hitting the arrow left key _without_ holding Shift.

    -- shown as String instead of List Char for readability
    CursorNone ( "ab", "cd" )
        |> arrowLeft
        == CursorNone ( "a", "bcd" )

    CursorNone ( "", "cd" )
        |> arrowLeft
        == CursorNone ( "", "cd" )

    CursorLeft ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowLeft
        == CursorNone ( "ab", "cdefg" )

    CursorRight ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowLeft
        == CursorNone ( "ab", "cdefg" )
values.type: Zipper.StringStringString.WithCursor.Zipper -> Zipper.StringStringString.WithCursor.Zipper

values.name: arrowLeftWithShift
values.comment:
Matches what happens when hitting the arrow left key _while_ holding Shift.

    -- shown as String instead of List Char for readability
    CursorNone ( "ab", "cd" )
        |> arrowLeftWithShift
        == CursorLeft ( "a", "b", "cd" )

    CursorNone ( "", "cd" )
        |> arrowLeftWithShift
        == CursorNone ( "", "cd" )

    CursorLeft ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowLeftWithShift
        == CursorLeft ( "a", "bcde", "fg" )

    CursorLeft ( "", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowLeftWithShift
        == CursorLeft ( "", "cde", "fg" )

    CursorRight ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowLeftWithShift
        == CursorNone ( "ab", "cd", "efg" )
values.type: Zipper.StringStringString.WithCursor.Zipper -> Zipper.StringStringString.WithCursor.Zipper

values.name: arrowRight
values.comment:
Matches what happens when hitting the arrow right key _without_ holding Shift.

    -- shown as String instead of List Char for readability
    CursorNone ( "ab", "cd" )
        |> arrowRight
        == CursorNone ( "abc", "d" )

    CursorNone ( "ab", "" )
        |> arrowRight
        == CursorNone ( "ab", "" )

    CursorLeft ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowRight
        == CursorNone ( "abcde", "fg" )

    CursorRight ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowRight
        == CursorNone ( "abcde", "fg" )
values.type: Zipper.StringStringString.WithCursor.Zipper -> Zipper.StringStringString.WithCursor.Zipper

values.name: arrowRightWithShift
values.comment:
Matches what happens when hitting the arrow right key _while_ holding Shift.

    -- shown as String instead of List Char for readability
    CursorNone ( "ab", "cd" )
        |> arrowRightWithShift
        == CursorLeft ( "a", "b", "cd" )

    CursorNone ( "ab", "" )
        |> arrowRightWithShift
        == CursorNone ( "", "cd" )

    CursorLeft ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowRightWithShift
        == CursorLeft ( "abc", "de", "fg" )

    CursorRight ( "ab", "cde", "" )
        |> arrowRightWithShift
        == CursorLeft ( "ab", "cde", "" )

    CursorRight ( "ab", "cde", "fg" )
        |> arrowRightWithShift
        == CursorNone ( "ab", "cdef", "g" )
